input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.6.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.6.4
            TITLE: catch cans for any vent on other systems containing liquid lubricant or coolant, including a

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.6.4: Catch cans for any vent on other systems containing liquid lubricant or coolant, including a
T.5.6.4 Catch cans for any vent on other systems containing liquid lubricant or coolant, including a 
differential, gearbox, or electric motor, must have a minimum capacity of 10% of the fluid 
being contained or 0.5 liter, whichever is higher

final_answer: Catch cans for any vent on other systems containing liquid lubricant or coolant, including a differential, gearbox, or electric motor, must have a minimum capacity of 10% of the fluid being contained or 0.5 liter, whichever is higher
